description: Implement Plugin Manager (Plugin Manager lifecycle, Plugin SDK interface, Plugin Marketplace, Plugin Permissions) and Update System (Update Manager, Version Manager, Signature Updater). Replace stubs with full implementations.
steps: Expand src/plugin/include/plugin/IPluginManager.h to add: PluginState enum (Unloaded/Loaded/Enabled/Disabled/Error), PluginPermission enum (NetworkAccess/FileRead/FileWrite/APIAccess/SystemInfo/ProcessControl), PluginHook struct (name, eventType, priority int), PluginSDKContext struct (pluginId, permissions set<PluginPermission>, apiVersion, dataDirectory), PluginDependency struct (pluginId, minVersion, required bool), PluginManifest struct (id, name, version, author, description, dependencies vector<PluginDependency>, requiredPermissions vector<PluginPermission>, hooks vector<PluginHook>, entryPoint). Add virtual methods: reloadPlugin(pluginId), getPluginState(pluginId), setPluginPermissions(pluginId, vector<PluginPermission>), getPluginPermissions(pluginId), checkPermission(pluginId, PluginPermission), resolveDependencies(pluginId), getPluginHooks(eventType), searchMarketplace(query), getMarketplaceEntry(pluginId), checkCompatibility(pluginId, version).

Expand src/plugin/include/plugin/PluginManager.h to declare all new methods with private members: plugins_ map, permissions_ map, manifests_ map, marketplace_ vector, hooks_ multimap, mutex_, counters.

Implement src/plugin/src/PluginManager.cpp: loadPlugin creates PluginInfo with Loaded state, stores manifest. unloadPlugin checks no dependents rely on it. reloadPlugin unloads then loads. enablePlugin/disablePlugin toggle state. setPluginPermissions/checkPermission manage fine-grained access. resolveDependencies performs topological sort of dependency graph. getPluginHooks returns hooks filtered by event type. Marketplace methods search/filter/check compatibility. installFromMarketplace validates compatibility then loads.

Expand src/updates/include/updates/IUpdateManager.h to add: UpdateChannel enum (Stable/Beta/Nightly), UpdateStatus enum (Available/Downloading/Downloaded/Installing/Installed/Failed/RolledBack), StagedRollout struct (id, version, percentage, startedAt, status), SignatureUpdate struct (id, type string [YARA/IOC/Signature], version, size, hash, timestamp), VersionCompatibility struct (minVersion, maxVersion, compatible bool, notes), UpdateProgress struct (version, status, bytesDownloaded, totalBytes, percentage). Add virtual methods: setUpdateChannel(UpdateChannel), getUpdateChannel(), getUpdateProgress(version), stageRollout(version, percentage), getSignatureUpdates(), downloadSignatureUpdate(id), installSignatureUpdate(id), checkVersionCompatibility(version), getUpdateHistory(), cancelUpdate(version).

Expand src/updates/include/updates/UpdateManager.h to declare all new methods with private members: channel_, updates_ map, progress_ map, rollouts_ map, signatureUpdates_ map, history_ vector, mutex_, counters.

Implement src/updates/src/UpdateManager.cpp: checkForUpdates returns updates based on channel (nightly has more, stable fewer). downloadUpdate tracks progress. installUpdate validates compatibility then applies. stageRollout manages percentage-based deployment. rollback reverts to previous version. Signature updates managed independently (downloadSignatureUpdate, installSignatureUpdate). getUpdateHistory tracks all operations. cancelUpdate stops in-progress downloads. All thread-safe.
Update src/plugin/CMakeLists.txt and src/updates/CMakeLists.txt if needed.

Create tests/plugin/test_plugin_manager.cpp: test load/unload/reload lifecycle, enable/disable state transitions, permission management (grant/check/revoke), dependency resolution (simple chain, circular detection), marketplace search and compatibility check, install from marketplace.

Create tests/updates/test_update_manager.cpp: test check for updates per channel, download/install lifecycle, staged rollout management, signature update independent workflow, version compatibility checking, rollback functionality, update history tracking, cancel update.
Update tests/CMakeLists.txt to add plugin and updates test files, include directories, link libraries.
acceptance_criteria: PluginManager load/unload/reload lifecycle works with proper state transitions
PluginManager permission model grants and checks permissions correctly
PluginManager dependency resolution detects missing dependencies
PluginManager marketplace search and compatibility checking works
UpdateManager returns updates filtered by channel
UpdateManager download/install tracks progress and status
UpdateManager staged rollout manages deployment percentage
UpdateManager signature updates work independently of app updates
UpdateManager rollback reverts to previous version
All existing tests continue to pass
